basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Data Manager posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time.

qualification.details: Data Manager: Essential: Graduate. Desirable: Qualification/experience in computer application.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Recruitment 2026 - Overview
AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Data Manager: Essential: Graduate. Desirable: Qualification/experience in computer application.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Data Manager post at AIIMS Bhopal is scheduled for 23 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Manager post?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for the Data Manager post is a Graduate degree. Having a qualification or experience in computer application is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Data Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Manager post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Data Manager position will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Data Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Data Manager post at AIIMS Bhopal through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Data Manager post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Data Manager post will involve a Skill Test and a Written Test.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bhopal Data Manager Recruitment 2026 being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, Bhopal - 462020.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the Data Manager post at AIIMS Bhopal.
